summary: Comprehensive E2E testing completed for Anima Fund platform - all backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns ok with creator_wallet
Backend: Genesis status returns not_created when no agent exists
Backend: Engine live returns false when not running
Backend: Engine status returns 324 genesis lines and 6 skills
Backend: All live endpoints return empty data when engine not running
Frontend: Genesis screen loads with Create Genesis Agent button
Frontend: All 9 sidebar navigation items present and functional
Frontend: All dashboard pages load with correct empty state messages
Frontend: Activity page has 3 required tabs (Tool Calls, Messages, Heartbeat)
Frontend: Configuration page has Engine and Constitution tabs
Frontend: Constitution content displays as immutable
Frontend: Header shows correct engine status
Code: No prohibited references (tycoon, demoMode, demo-mode, shutdown, eth_account) found
Data: MongoDB clean with no dummy/seed data
Files: Genesis prompt has exactly 324 lines
Files: 6 skills exist in automaton directory
